steps.title: Identify what the blank needs
steps.content: The blank begins a sentence that ends with the participial phrase "resulting in his dance pieces... being received... as groundbreaking artworks." That phrase describes a consequence of whatever the blank states. The blank must supply a claim about Cunningham that logically produces that result — his works being seen as groundbreaking rather than merely experimental.

steps.title: Eliminate the choices
steps.content:
• Choice A — Moreover, Cunningham incorporated his principles with great skill and artistry,: "Moreover" adds a further positive claim. Cunningham executing his philosophy with skill and artistry directly explains why audiences received the works as groundbreaking art, not just odd experiments. The logic holds: radical departure + skilled execution → recognized as groundbreaking. ✓
  • Choice B — Specifically, Cunningham was an accomplished dancer as well as a choreographer,: Being a dancer as well as a choreographer is a biographical detail that does not explain why his pieces were received as groundbreaking artworks. "Specifically" signals an example of the previous sentence, but nothing about dancing ability connects to reception. ✗
  • Choice C — Accordingly, Cunningham founded his namesake dance company in 1953,: Founding a company does not lead to works being received as groundbreaking. "Accordingly" implies his company founding was a consequence of his radical departure — that is neither logical nor supported by the passage. ✗
  • Choice D — In contrast, Cunningham gained a reputation as an unpredictable iconoclast,: "In contrast" signals opposition to the previous sentence, but being an iconoclast does not explain the reception as groundbreaking art. The contrast relationship is also unsupported — being a radical departure and being an iconoclast are not opposites. ✗
That is the correct answer.
